summary: Engagement Outlook Card Feature - All 12 backend tests PASSED (100%), All frontend tests PASSED. New deterministic intelligence card correctly implemented on Journey page.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: GET /api/intelligence/program/{program_id}/engagement-outlook returns structured card data
VERIFIED: Response includes card_type, program_id, freshness_label, freshness_color, pipeline_health_state, next_step, signals, data_confidence
VERIFIED: UF program returns freshness_label='Active Recently' (green), next_step with urgency='high' (unanswered coach question), 4 signals
VERIFIED: Stanford program returns freshness_label='No Recent Engagement' (gray), next_step about starting conversation, 2 signals
VERIFIED: Journey page shows EngagementOutlookCard in Intelligence section with data-testid='engagement-outlook-card'
VERIFIED: Clicking card header triggers API fetch and expands card
VERIFIED: Expanded card shows next-step-card (data-testid='next-step-card') as the most prominent element
VERIFIED: Pro user (Emma Chen) sees Signals breakdown section with individual signal items (data-testid='signal-0', etc.)
VERIFIED: Engagement Outlook card appears FIRST in Intelligence section (before School Insight and Recruiting Timeline cards)
CODE QUALITY: _build_next_step() function has clear priority order for action recommendations
CODE QUALITY: _FRESHNESS_LABELS mapping provides consistent label/color pairs
seed_data_creation: None - used existing Emma Chen data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Engagement Outlook card is the new deterministic (no LLM) intelligence card on Journey page. Endpoint: GET /api/intelligence/program/{program_id}/engagement-outlook. Returns: freshness_label (Active Recently|Needs Follow-Up|Momentum Slowing|No Recent Engagement), freshness_color (green|amber|orange|gray), next_step with action/urgency/context, signals array (Pro users only), pipeline_health_state. Frontend component: /app/frontend/src/components/intelligence/EngagementOutlookCard.js. Card is expandable - user clicks header to load data. Pro users see signals breakdown, basic users see only next step. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_engagement_outlook.py (12 tests). Total iterations: 95.

frontend_journey_page.freshness_pill_displayed: PASS (UF: Active Recently, Stanford: No Recent Engagement)

next_step.action: Start a conversation with this program
